command:
ls -la && printf '
--- package scripts ---
' && node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(Object.keys(p.scripts||{}).sort().join('
'))" && printf '
--- parity-related files ---
' && find tests src/tests/integration -maxdepth 3 \( -path 'tests/parity*' -o -name '*parity*' -o -name 'run.ts' -o -name 'e2e-*.test.ts' -o -name 'pack-install.test.ts' \) | sort

command: find tests -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort && printf '\n---\n' && find src/tests/integration -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort

---
src/tests/integration/ci_monitor.test.ts
sr

command:
node --experimental-strip-types tests/parity/run.ts --format json > /tmp/parity-runner.out 2> /tmp/parity-runner.err; status=$?; echo STATUS:$status; echo '--- STDERR ---'; cat /tmp/parity-runner.err; echo '--- STDOUT HEAD ---'; python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/tmp/parity-runner.out')
text=p.read_text() if p.exists() else ''
print(text[:4000])
PY

outputSnippet:
